title: Woman in a Dressing Gown
actors: Yvonne Mitchell, Anthony Quayle, Sylvia Syms
plot: A middle-aged married woman is shocked to discover that her husband, whom she thought was content in their marriage, has become infatuated with a beautiful younger woman and plans to leave his family for her.
awards: Nominated for 2 BAFTA 4 wins & 3 nominations total
